channel.title: Posts on racoonsec
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on racoonsec

item.title: Example CTF Writeup
item.description:
Example CTF Writeup

This is a template for a CTF writeup post. Replace this with your actual challenge details.

Challenge Description

Describe the challenge here. What was the objective? What category was it (web, crypto, pwn, reverse, etc.)?

Solution

Step 1: Initial Analysis

Explain what you found or did first.

Step 2: Key Discovery

Detail any important findings.

Step 3: Exploitation/Solution

Walk through how you solved it.

Flag

flag{example_flag_here}

Tools Used

  • Tool 1
  • Tool 2
  • Tool 3

References

  • Reference link 1
  • Reference link 2

item.title: Welcome
item.description:
This is the first post in the new Hugo site.

It confirms that the theme, list pages, and taxonomy pages are wired up correctly.
